title: PolicyChunk
description: Single chunk of regulation text for RAG retrieval

text.description: Clean regulation text (one clause or coherent segment)

source.description: Regulatory authority (e.g. FDA, EMA, CDSCO, ICH, EU, HHS)

category.description: Category from taxonomy (e.g. Promotion, Adverse events, Privacy)

page_start.description: First page number in original PDF (1-based)

page_end.description: Last page number in original PDF (1-based)
